sentences.arabic: تَعَلُّمُ الْبَرْمَجَةِ يَفْتَحُ أَبْوَابًا كَثِيرَةً لِلْعَمَلِ فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Učenje programiranja otvara mnoga vrata za posao u budućnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Learning programming opens many doors for work in the future.

sentences.arabic: يَكْتُبُ الْمُبَرْمِجُ رُمُوزًا خَاصَّةً لِإِنْشَاءِ مَوَاقِعِ الْوِيبِ وَالتَّطْبِيقَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Programer piše posebne kodove za kreiranje web stranica i aplikacija.
sentences.translationEn: The programmer writes special codes to create websites and applications.

sentences.arabic: تُوجَدُ مَصَادِرُ مَجَّانِيَّةٌ عَلَى الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ لِتَعَلُّمِ هَذِهِ الْمَهَارَةِ.
sentences.translation: Na internetu postoje besplatni izvori za učenje ove vještine.
sentences.translationEn: There are free resources on the internet to learn this skill.
